'''Fusion Holodrama''' was a [[Holodrama/Legends|holodrama]] production company around the time of the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. The company paid for [[Soontir Fel/Legends|Soontir Fel's]] and [[Syal Antilles Fel|Wynssa Starflare's]] honeymoon in an attempt to convince the latter to star in one of their productions.

{{Company-stub}}
